articles.title: Russian soldiers tell BBC they saw fellow troops executed on commanders' orders
articles.summary: Four men expose the horror and brutality of conditions in the Ukraine war, with two saying they saw soldiers being shot for refusing orders.

articles.title: Mexico hunts 23 inmates sprung from jail during wave of violence
articles.summary: The prisoners escaped from a jail in Puerto Vallarta after armed men rammed one of the gates.

articles.summary: Hundreds of people have been displaced and dozens are missing, with rescue operations still ongoing in Juiz de Fora.

articles.title: Robert Carradine, Lizzie McGuire and Revenge of the Nerds star, dies aged 71
articles.summary: His family says the actor took his own life after living with bipolar disorder for nearly two decades.

articles.title: Ghana drops coup leader's name from main airport on putsch anniversary
articles.summary: Supporters of the move said the Kotoka name contradicted the country’s democratic values.
